ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Courgette or zucchini, pulp and peel, raw
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no other enrichment
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no other enrichment

ingredients.text: Cooked and Seasoned Chicken Breast Fillet Pieces

ingredients_text: 36% Mixed Vegetables in Varying Proportions (Courgette, Red Peppers, Green Beans, Tomatoes), 24% Tomato and Basil Sauce (Water, Concentrated Tomato Purée, Onion, Chicken Stock [Chicken, Water], Rapeseed Oil, Sugar, Basil, Maize Starch, White Wine (Sulphites), Wheat Flour, Salt, Chicken Fat, Seasoning (Carrot, Leek, Garlic, Onion, Red Peppers, Parsnip, Turmeric, Lovage Root), Maltodextrin), 23% Rigatoni Pasta (Water, Durum Wheat Semolina), 17% Cooked and Seasoned Chicken Breast Fillet Pieces (Chicken Breast, Dextrose, Potato Starch, Salt).
